name: Practically Nonfat Bean and Green Risotto
recipeIngredient: 1 large Leek, chopped (white and pale green parts)
1 can Red beans (15 to 16 oz), drained
OR - Kidney beans, rinsed and drained
OR - 1/4 Head Curly Endive, thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy large saucepan, bring broth and wine to a boil.
2. Add onion, leek, rice, and garlic. Return to boil.
3. Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer, uncovered, stirring occasionally until the rice is tender and the mixture is thick and creamy, about 30 minutes.
4. Mix in beans, radicchio, and arugula. Cook until vegetables wilt, about 2 minutes.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste. Serve, passing Parmesan cheese separately if desired.
